hero.title:
Count less.
Live more.
hero.body: A premium life clock for people who refuse to drift. Track the time you hope to live, keep one meaningful bucket close, and return to the day before it disappears.

mock.caption: Time left
mock.bucketText: Write one thing you do not want to postpone.

app.title: A clock for finite days.
app.lead: Heaven's Clock is not a productivity dashboard. It is a ritual: mortality becomes attention, attention becomes action, and action becomes a life you recognize.
app.lifeClock: See your remaining life as years, days, hours, minutes, seconds, and living rings.
app.todayBucket: Let one meaningful bucket item rotate on the main screen so it stays close to your choices.
app.clockSkins: Premium clock skins can make the same reminder feel ancient, luxurious, futuristic, or deeply personal.

beta.title: From Android beta to public launch.
beta.lead: The site supports the app. The app comes first, then the circle grows from real users who felt the clock change their day.
beta.step1: Finish the core Android experience: onboarding, life clock, bucket list, themes, and language flow.
beta.step2: Use this landing page to gather early testers and explain why the app exists.
beta.step3: Prepare store assets, privacy policy, screenshots, and a focused first release.
beta.step4: Only after real use, evolve toward shared buckets, groups, and a school for finite days.

community.manifesto: A global circle for people who share goals, buckets, and the courage to live before the day is gone.
community.signal1: A future place to learn how to choose, plan, and live with mortality in view.
community.signal2: People will be able to share goals and find others walking toward the same kind of life.
community.signal3: The community should feel like a real circle, not another feed built for distraction.

join.title: The app comes first. The circle follows.
join.lead: We are preparing the Android beta and the first public path. Join the list if you want to test Heaven's Clock before it becomes a larger community.
join.note: This preview stores your email only on this device. A real waitlist provider will be connected before public release.
join.success: You're on the local preview list. Real waitlist connection comes before public release.

footer: Heaven's Clock · A reminder to live before the day is gone.
